event_celebration_templates.title: Wedding Ceremony Romantic Captures
event_celebration_templates.description: Cinematic wedding ceremony with golden hour lighting and romantic atmosphere
event_celebration_templates.prompt: Elegant outdoor wedding ceremony at golden hour, bride in flowing white gown and groom in classic tuxedo exchanging vows under floral arch, soft bokeh background with string lights, gentle breeze moving veil, emotional tears of joy, warm sunset lighting casting romantic glow, professional cinematography with shallow depth of field, 8K quality

event_celebration_templates.title: Birthday Party Joyful Moments
event_celebration_templates.description: Vibrant birthday celebration with cake, confetti, and pure joy
event_celebration_templates.prompt: Joyful birthday party celebration, child blowing out candles on colorful tiered cake, friends and family cheering in background, confetti falling in slow motion, balloons floating, bright festive decorations, warm indoor lighting with party lights, genuine smiles and laughter, candid moment capture, vibrant colors, 4K quality

event_celebration_templates.title: Corporate Event Professional Coverage
event_celebration_templates.description: Professional corporate event with keynote speakers and networking
event_celebration_templates.prompt: Professional corporate conference event, keynote speaker on modern stage with LED screens, audience in business attire attentively listening, dramatic stage lighting with blue and white tones, wide establishing shot transitioning to medium shots, modern venue architecture, professional camera work with smooth movements, crisp 4K quality

event_celebration_templates.title: Festival Atmosphere with Crowds
event_celebration_templates.description: Dynamic festival scene with energetic crowds and vibrant atmosphere
event_celebration_templates.prompt: Vibrant music festival at dusk, massive crowd with hands raised, colorful stage lights and laser beams cutting through smoke, DJ or band performing on main stage, festival-goers dancing and celebrating, aerial drone shot revealing festival scale, neon colors and dynamic lighting effects, high energy atmosphere, cinematic 4K capture

event_celebration_templates.title: Anniversary Celebration Intimacy
event_celebration_templates.description: Intimate anniversary dinner with romantic ambiance
event_celebration_templates.prompt: Intimate anniversary celebration, elegant couple toasting champagne glasses at candlelit dinner table, soft romantic lighting with candles and fairy lights, rose petals scattered on table, upscale restaurant setting with blurred background, close-up of intertwined hands with wedding rings, genuine emotional connection, warm color palette, cinematic shallow focus

event_celebration_templates.title: Graduation Ceremony Achievements
event_celebration_templates.description: Triumphant graduation ceremony capturing achievement and pride
event_celebration_templates.prompt: Graduation ceremony celebration, graduate in cap and gown throwing mortarboard high in air, proud family members applauding in background, university campus setting with classical architecture, golden afternoon sunlight, confetti and diplomas in frame, mix of joy and accomplishment on faces, slow motion cap toss moment, professional documentary style

technical_specs.color_grading: natural with enhanced blues and golds

event_celebration_templates.title: Holiday Gathering Warmth
event_celebration_templates.description: Warm family holiday gathering with festive decorations
event_celebration_templates.prompt: Cozy holiday family gathering around decorated Christmas tree, multi-generational family exchanging gifts, warm fireplace glow mixing with twinkling tree lights, children's excited faces opening presents, hot cocoa and cookies on coffee table, snow visible through windows, authentic candid moments of laughter and hugs, warm color grading with red and gold accents

technical_specs.color_grading: warm with red and gold highlights

event_celebration_templates.title: Concert/Show Event Energy
event_celebration_templates.description: High-energy concert performance with dramatic lighting
event_celebration_templates.prompt: Epic rock concert performance, lead singer commanding stage with dramatic spotlights, massive crowd with phone lights creating sea of stars, pyrotechnics and smoke effects, guitarist mid-solo with stage lights creating silhouette, dynamic camera movements between stage and audience, intense energy and raw emotion, concert hall filled to capacity

event_celebration_templates.title: Baby Shower Tenderness
event_celebration_templates.description: Tender baby shower celebration with soft pastels and joy
event_celebration_templates.prompt: Gentle baby shower celebration, expectant mother cradling baby bump surrounded by loved ones, soft pastel decorations in pink and blue, delicate paper lanterns and balloons, gift opening moment with tiny baby clothes, afternoon tea setting with cupcakes and floral arrangements, soft natural window light creating ethereal atmosphere, tender emotional moments

event_celebration_templates.title: New Year Countdown Excitement
event_celebration_templates.description: Exciting New Year's Eve countdown with fireworks finale
event_celebration_templates.prompt: Spectacular New Year's Eve countdown celebration, massive crowd in city square counting down final seconds, giant digital clock showing midnight approach, champagne bottles popping at stroke of midnight, magnificent fireworks exploding over city skyline, confetti cannons releasing golden streams, people kissing and embracing, mix of wide cityscape and intimate celebration moments

usage_notes.resolution: All templates support 4K output with downscale options
usage_notes.customization: Prompts can be modified while maintaining core emotional themes
usage_notes.audio: Audio suggestions are guidelines - actual implementation depends on platform
usage_notes.duration: Durations are flexible based on platform capabilities
